intro:
Master the business English native speakers actually use!
Have fun leveling up your skills through quizzes!
description:
"I'm just playing a game, but somehow my workplace English is getting better."
Want to experience this ultimate two-for-one deal?

Enjoy 4-choice quizzes while quickly mastering the "real-life English idioms" that native speakers naturally use in business settings.

Playing is super easy：
・Read the question and the target word carefully.
・Pick your answer from the 4 choices.
・Get it right to unlock detailed explanations you can use right away in your actual business emails and conversations!

No typing or complicated controls needed!
It's totally fine if you're feeling a bit rusty with your English.

If you get stuck, our friendly hint feature has your back. You can soak up knowledge like a fun trivia game, completely stress-free with no ""Game Over"" screens to worry about.

Thanks to the fast-paced, one-question-at-a-time format, it's perfect for sneaking in some playtime during your daily commute or while waiting for a meeting to start!

Turn your daily ""mindless screen time"" into meaningful self-investment. Level up your English skills and seriously impress your coworkers and business partners!
